_how_to_use: cp station_config.example.json station_config.json — then edit for your deployment.
_security_profile_guide: 2: wss:// — TLS + Basic Auth (user/password required, min 16 chars)
3: wss:// — TLS + Client Certificate / Mutual TLS (client_cert + client_key required)
_basic_auth_note: Required for profile 1 and 2. Password must be 16-40 characters.
_tls_note: cert_dir : directory where InstallCertificate/CertificateSigned will write files
ca_cert  : server CA cert path (leave empty to use system CAs — e.g. Let's Encrypt)
client_cert / client_key : required for profile 3 only
